subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Refuge, my Haven, my Shelter! I supplicate unto the Kingdom of Thy mystic realm and the Dominion of Thine One Essence, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و ملجای و مهربی و مناصی ابتهل الی ملکوت غیبک و جبروت احدیه ذاتک ان
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant
